pageContext.name: Earth Mode Optimus Prime
pageContext.description: Sideshow and YOLOPARK are very proud to present the Earth Mode Optimus Prime Model Kit from the Plamo series. The kits are buildable and contain both metal and plastic parts. The completed figure possesses suberb articulation for posing in any number of scenes limited only by your imagination. Completed model stands 30cm (11.81 inches) tall.
